title: Dungeons and Taverns Woodland Mansion Overhaul
description: This Mod Overhauls the Woodland Mansion with 184 different rooms and 8 type of rooms. adding a basement layer and a road leading away from the woodland mansion
body:
This mod is part of the [Dungeons and Taverns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeon-and-taverns) series, but **does not require** Dungeons and Taverns to work. The main Dungeons and Taverns mod **does NOT include** this mod's features. If you would like more structures similar to this one, then check [my profile!](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nova_wostra/projects)

 - This Structure datapack no longer replaces the woodland mansion with the Illager Manor from main Dungeons and Taverns, from 1.21.9 onward. Instead properly overhauling it.
 - 184 total rooms spread over the 8 type of rooms
 - Overhauled loot table with morer esources
 - Supply chest loot table for the infamous empty storage room chests
 - Basememnt level accesed by the staircase at the backside of the mansion
 - Secret rooms for both basement and normal mansion layers
 - Witches and Pillager moved in
 - Entry of the woodland mansion generates a long path away from it, Guarded by Pillager
 - various houseshapes for a bit more variety
